description: In Kanban view add a File Explorer that defaults to the currently chosen project If there's no currently chosen project then it should just show nothing until you choose a project and also whenever you click file it should load that into something that can the file in a different window that's a pop out and that window should have syntax highlighting and it should support Powershell Python marked down and other common formats and if the user opens up another file it should go to that existing window with a left side menu where you can kind of click between all open files and you should be able to edit files inside of this window as well just like in VS code
title: Add File Explorer with Syntax-Highlighted Editor Window

descriptionHistory.description: In Kanban view add a File Explorer that defaults to the currently chosen project If there's no currently chosen project then it should just show nothing until you choose a project and also whenever you click file it should load that into something that can the file in a different window that's a pop out and that window should have syntax highlighting and it should support Powershell Python marked down and other common formats and if the user opens up another file it should go to that existing window with a left side menu where you can kind of click between all open files and you should be able to edit files inside of this window as well just like in VS code
